svg.aria-label: Cambium architecture: one orchestrator feeds 11 councils and their 46 named agents. Each council header states what that council does. The Verification board is independent: whoever writes something is never who approves it.
svg.text: field-agnostic · human-in-the-loop at every gate · no agent grades its own homework
colors = council hue · each chip is one named agent · the Verification board is independent: whoever writes is never who approves
